all.en: Please read these notes carefully before submitting your travel reimbursement claim.
all.zh: 提交差旅費報銷申請前，請仔細閱讀以下說明。

all.en: All claims must be filed within thirty days after the trip ends.
all.zh: 所有申請須於行程結束後 30 天內提出。

all.en: Late submissions require written approval from your department director.
all.zh: 逾期提交須取得所屬部門主管書面核准。

all.en: Use the official online portal located under the Finance tab.
all.zh: 請使用財務頁籤下的官方線上入口提交。

all.en: Paper forms are no longer accepted at any regional office.
all.zh: 任何區域辦公室皆不再接受紙本表單。

all.en: Each expense line item must reference a valid project or cost center.
all.zh: 每筆費用項目須對應有效專案或成本中心。

all.en: Receipts should be uploaded as clear PDF or JPEG files.
all.zh: 收據應以清晰之 PDF 或 JPEG 檔案上傳。

all.en: Images must show the merchant name, date, items, and total amount.
all.zh: 影像須呈現店家名稱、日期、品項及總金額。

all.en: Credit card statements alone do not count as valid proof of purchase.
all.zh: 僅信用卡帳單無法視為有效消費憑證。

all.en: Airfare must be booked through our corporate travel agent CarlsonGo.
all.zh: 機票須透過我們的企業差旅代理 CarlsonGo 訂購。

all.en: Bookings made outside the platform require pre-trip exception approval.
all.zh: 於平台外訂購之機票須事先取得例外核可。

all.en: Economy class is mandatory for flights under six hours in duration.
all.zh: 六小時以內航班規定須搭乘經濟艙。

all.en: Business class is allowed for flights longer than six hours.
all.zh: 六小時以上航班可搭乘商務艙。

all.en: Hotel rates should not exceed the city cap listed in the policy.
all.zh: 飯店房價不得超過政策中所列城市上限。

all.en: Meals are reimbursed at the daily per diem rate of the destination.
all.zh: 餐費依目的地每日定額補助標準報銷。

all.en: Alcohol purchased during meals is not reimbursable under any circumstance.
all.zh: 用餐時購買之酒類在任何情況下皆不予報銷。

all.en: Tips up to twenty percent of the meal cost are acceptable.
all.zh: 餐費 20% 以內之小費可被接受。

all.en: Ground transportation includes taxis, ride share, and public transit.
all.zh: 地面交通包含計程車、共乘服務與大眾運輸。

all.en: Rental cars require justification when public options are available.
all.zh: 如有大眾運輸選項時，租車須附說明理由。

all.en: Foreign currency expenses are converted using the rate on the receipt date.
all.zh: 外幣費用依收據日期之匯率換算。

all.en: Personal expenses mixed into a business receipt must be excluded.
all.zh: 若商業收據中混入個人消費，須予以扣除。

all.en: Approved claims are reimbursed within ten business days via direct deposit.
all.zh: 核准之申請於 10 個工作天內以匯款方式撥付。

all.en: Contact the finance shared service desk for any urgent questions.
all.zh: 如有緊急問題，請聯絡財務共享服務台。

all.en: Thank you for following these guidelines and helping us close books promptly.
all.zh: 感謝您遵循本指引並協助我們及時結帳。
